case_title: ABC TECHNOLOGIES VS SOUTHERN CALIFORNIA LEASING,INC/BARBARA GRIFFITH

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ABC TECHNOLOGIES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SOUTHERN CALIFORNIA LEASING,INC/BARBARA GRIFFITH $375.00 PRINCIPAL, $34.38 INTEREST, $32.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $441.38 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF SEP-18-2007, DENIED
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-14-2005, OFF CALENDAR DEFECTIVE CERTIFIED MAIL. PLTF TO RE-SET AND RE-SERVE DEFENDANT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ABC TECHNOLOGIES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SOUTHERN CALIFORNIA LEASING,INC/BARBARA GRIFFITH $375.00 PRINCIPAL, $34.38 INTEREST, $32.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $441.38 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
THE COURT VACATES JUDGMENT AND DIMISSES BARBARA GRIFFITH AS A PARTY, THE EXISTING JUDGMENT REMAINS IN EFFECT AS TO DEFT SOUTHERN CALIF. LEASING CORP.
